title: Magic and Souls
description: It's a magic mod based on scrolls and elements. Magic and Souls will also include soul-based spells.
body:
# **Magic and Souls**

Magic and Souls is a Magic mod focused on PVP and PVE aspects, the mod will add many new interactions to how fighting may occur.

## Helpful guides

Currently, a wiki is being made on _Github_ for how to use and obtain every item in this mod, when the wiki is complete this page will be updated.

## Things to be aware of

This mod has barely any effort put in it, this may change in the future, but for now please be patient with us.

## Join the Discord!

We have a Discord server where you can report bugs or suggest ideas!

# **Bugs and other issues**

Many issues are bound to happen, we are still in the early stages of the mod. Common bugs can be found on the GitHub page. To report any bugs you find, please make a GitHub issue or contact us using the public discord server
